name: issue_refund
description: Issue a full or partial refund on a captured Razorpay payment. Refunds are processed asynchronously and typically take 5-7 business days depending on the payment method. You can issue multiple partial refunds as long as the total does not exceed the captured amount.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The ID of the captured payment to refund (path parameter, starts with 'pay_').

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The refund amount in smallest currency unit. Omit for a full refund.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Refund speed: 'normal' (5-7 days) or 'optimum' (instant for eligible refunds).

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Key-value pairs with refund reason or metadata.

parameters.name: receipt
parameters.description: Your internal refund receipt number. Max 40 characters.
